mechanics.excerpt: As such; the wound value ot all wounds is reduced by against character with this trait; For example_ Minor Wound against character with Toughness has wound value of rather than 2 (this does not affect the wound type_ only the wound value). Note this has effect on the Fatigue Only result , which has usual effects (see Damage. p.
